contentMap.original: The core product is a base sneaker engineered specifically for Indian foot anatomy. The upper features designated modular zones (like the side panel or heel tab). Instead of buying a static shoe, the user buys a canvas and a set of authentic, hyper-local fabric patches that physically attach to the shoe
contentMap.current: The core product is a base sneaker engineered specifically for Indian foot anatomy. The upper features designated modular zones (like the side panel or heel tab). Instead of buying a static shoe, the user buys a canvas and a set of authentic, hyper-local fabric patches that physically attach to the shoe
contentMap.label: The core product is a base sneaker engineered specifically f...

contentMap.original: The user journey bridges the digital and physical worlds. The user goes online, visually builds their shoe using a digital customizer, and receives a physical kit to assemble at home. This satisfies the user's craving for DIY fashion while creating a deep, psychological "IKEA effect" bond with the product.
contentMap.current: The user journey bridges the digital and physical worlds. contentMap.original: Our logo uses a spiral to represent self-expression, shaped as a shoe print to reflect sneakers as a personal medium for expression. Combined with a traditional Indian motif and enclosed within a patch form, the mark reflects cultural identity and the reversible patch system of the brand.

contentMap.original: 09. Key Learnings
contentMap.current: 09. Key Learnings
contentMap.label: 09. Key Learnings

contentMap.original: Taking Svaroots from zero to one taught me that a beautiful UI cannot hide a broken system. Bridging the gap between the B2C consumer customizer and the B2B admin dashboard proved that successful product design requires viewing the platform as a living ecosystem. Hand-coding the MVP solidified my belief that the best design decisions are made when you deeply understand both business strategy and technical constraints.
contentMap.current: Taking Svaroots from zero to one taught me that a beautiful UI cannot hide a broken system. Bridging the gap between the B2C consumer customizer and the B2B admin dashboard proved that successful product design requires viewing the platform as a living ecosystem. Hand-coding the MVP solidified my belief that the best design decisions are made when you deeply understand both business strategy and technical constraints.
contentMap.label: Taking Svaroots from zero to one taught me that a beautiful ...

contentMap.original: Pottery, one of the oldest professions in the world, involving significant skills and precision is overlooked these days, this sector faces many problems and lacks major interventions and support. This case study tackles one such major problem : the loss of time, value and money incurred due to pots breakage.
contentMap.current: Pottery, one of the oldest professions in the world, involving significant skills and precision is overlooked these days, this sector faces many problems and lacks major interventions and support. This case study tackles one such major problem : the loss of time, value and money incurred due to pots breakage.

contentMap.original: The difference in gemstone colours is based on the trace elements they contain, physical differences in the crystals, and the way they refract light. For instance, a physical process called “charge transfer”, as well as the presence of titanium and iron, are what produce the blue colour in sapphires.
contentMap.current: The difference in gemstone colours is based on the trace elements they contain, physical differences in the crystals, and the way they refract light. For instance, a physical process called “charge transfer”, as well as the presence of titanium and iron, are what produce the blue colour in sapphires.

contentMap.original: The idea that gemstones possess special powers of healing or luck is ancient. In Europe throughout the Middle Ages, medicine men sold powdered gems for medicinal purposes. This practice is still known in some parts of Asia today.

contentMap.original: The core product is a base sneaker engineered specifically for Indian foot anatomy. The upper features designated modular zones (like the side panel or heel tab). Instead of buying a static shoe, the user buys a canvas and a set of authentic, hyper-local fabric patches that physically attach to the shoe

contentMap.original: The user journey bridges the digital and physical worlds. The user goes online, visually builds their shoe using a digital customizer, and receives a physical kit to assemble at home. This satisfies the user's craving for DIY fashion while creating a deep, psychological "IKEA effect" bond with the product.

contentMap.original: Our logo uses a spiral to represent self-expression, shaped as a shoe print to reflect sneakers as a personal medium for expression. Combined with a traditional Indian motif and enclosed within a patch form, the mark reflects cultural identity and the reversible patch system of the brand.

contentMap.original: 09. Key Learnings
contentMap.current: 09. Key Learnings
contentMap.label: 09. Key Learnings

contentMap.original: Taking Svaroots from zero to one taught me that a beautiful UI cannot hide a broken system. Bridging the gap between the B2C consumer customizer and the B2B admin dashboard proved that successful product design requires viewing the platform as a living ecosystem. Hand-coding the MVP solidified my belief that the best design decisions are made when you deeply understand both business strategy and technical constraints.
contentMap.current: Taking Svaroots from zero to one taught me that a beautiful UI cannot hide a broken system. Bridging the gap between the B2C consumer customizer and the B2B admin dashboard proved that successful product design requires viewing the platform as a living ecosystem. Hand-coding the MVP solidified my belief that the best design decisions are made when you deeply understand both business strategy and technical constraints.
contentMap.label: Taking Svaroots from zero to one taught me that a beautiful ...
